deployment_question: How does the model extrapolate to unseen contiguous regions of mutation space?
definition: Hold out contiguous mutational regions, positions, or sequence neighborhoods rather than randomly mixing mutations across train and test.

split_operator.spectra_mapping: samples lower mutational-neighborhood overlap than random mutation splits

implementation_recipe: Map mutations to positions or sequence regions.
Hold out contiguous positions, windows, or regions from training.
Report sequence distance to nearest training mutants.
quality_gates: Clarify whether the task is interpolation among mutations or extrapolation to unseen regions.
Check mutation-count and label distributions across splits.
failure_modes: Contiguous regions can differ in assay coverage or functional importance.
Combinatorial mutations can cross region boundaries.
Hamming distance alone may miss structural or epistatic effects.

citations.title: NABench: Large-Scale Benchmarks of Nucleotide Foundation Models for Fitness Prediction
citations.evidence: Contrasts random cross-validation with contiguous cross-validation for extrapolation to unseen mutational regions.

citations.title: Neural network extrapolation to distant regions of the protein fitness landscape
citations.evidence: Studies model extrapolation to distant protein fitness landscape regions.
